Lyrics.text:
Raha manjenjena foana
Mila toky izany fo,
Fa ny ora manoloana,
No manjombona tokoa:

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Indro! Jeso (Indro! Jeso)
Mitomany, (Mitomany)
Fa ny fony tia anao
Eo anilanao hatrany
Tsy miala na mandao.

Raha misento sy misaona,
Fa mamely ny manjo
Hasambarana mivaona,
Hafaliana zary lo.

Fa ny alom-pijaliana
Fanafody mahasoa
Ka omena zaza tiana
Mba hitombo sy hamoa.
